title: Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
